productDisplayName: Baggit Women Lallu Taj Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or convert it to a sling bag with the detachable shoulder strap.Dimensions: 14 cm x 10 cmCrafted from fabric and jute with a foldover designOne zippered compartment on the frontOne main pocket on the sideOne zippered pocket on the backFour card holder slots and a pocket on the left foldTwo pockets and an id card holder slot on the right foldBrand button on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
